Title: Schlage Andover Interior Knob with Deadbolt in Oil Rubbed Bronze  
Category: Door Hardware  
Brand: Schlage  
Description: Durable and secure interior knob with deadbolt, designed for easy installation.  
Details: Features a non-handed knob style, requires front exterior handleset to complete, with a lifetime mechanical and finish warranty.

Title: KiCA JETFAN 1.0 Mini Electric Air Duster Fan Blower  
Category: Electronics  
Brand: RICCA  
Description: A compact, high-speed electric air duster fan designed for efficient cleaning and outdoor use.  
Details: Features a powerful motor reaching up to 100,000 rpm with 11.5 m/s wind speed, adjustable 4-level settings, and versatile applications including electronics cleaning, air cushion inflation, and drying.

Category: Electronics  
Brand: Bose

Details: Features up to 20 hours wireless playtime, Bluetooth and NFC pairing, noise-rejecting dual microphones, and comfortable lightweight design with included accessories.

Brand: Hollyland

Brand: WonVon
